title: cyperus corymbosus var. longispiculatus
intro: Cyperus corymbosus var. longispiculatus, also known as the Long-spiked Flat-sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus corymbosus var. longispiculatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots or rhizomes in hot water.
